name: agent-stop-verify
description: When the agent stops after modifying modern domain code, run lint+verify and downgrade any affected rule's status if it was implemented_verified but examples no longer pass.

script: #   - had status implemented_verified prior to this session, AND
#   - has at least one failing example now
# update its status to implemented_unverified and add a notes entry:
# DO NOT auto-update the source code. DO NOT auto-edit the rule.
# This hook only updates the status field and the notes field.

notes: This is the safety-net hook that enforces 'status is earned, not assigned.'
Without it, status: implemented_verified can rot silently when modern code
If your team finds the downgrade noisy on WIP branches, gate this hook to
main-branch sessions only, OR change the trigger to pre-merge instead.
